name: Repeated authentication failures
description: Repeated failed authentication attempts from one source address.
remediation: Validate the source, affected identities, and authentication controls.

name: Distributed password spray
description: One identity receives failures from multiple source addresses.
remediation: Review identity telemetry and validate whether the account is targeted.

name: HTTP 401/403 burst
description: Burst of unauthorized or forbidden web/API responses from one source.
remediation: Review requested resources and authentication enforcement.

name: Suspicious administrative access
description: Administrative path access following repeated failures; manual review required.
remediation: Manually validate the administrative access sequence and actor context.

name: Path probing
description: One source receives 404 responses across multiple distinct paths.
remediation: Review requested paths and consider application-level rate controls.

name: High request-rate indicator
description: Local event-volume threshold exceeded; this is not confirmed denial-of-service activity.

name: Locally blocklisted indicator activity
description: An event matches the application-only simulated blocklist.
remediation: Review the simulated containment record; no real firewall action occurred.

name: Repeated authorization denials
description: Repeated authorization denials grouped by identity or source.
remediation: Review authorization policy and actor access requirements.
